title: 紫藤夫人
theme: 民国广东·宝殊镇连环命案
synopsis: 民国三年（1914年）9月4日，广东宝殊镇。三个月前，葛家家主葛继先被土匪绑架惨死。葛月萝悲痛欲绝，迁怒全宅奴仆。在这座隐藏着太平天国宝藏秘密的小镇上，一场精心策划的连环谋杀正在上演——而真凶，就藏在幸存者之中。
styleGuide: 1914 Guangdong Baoshu town, realistic oil painting, warm sepia tones, Republican era Chinese town, wisteria imagery

cover.prompt: Vertical poster for a 1914 Guangdong town murder mystery. A misty Chinese town nestled in mountains, wisteria vines climbing old walls, warm sepia tones, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, vintage film grain, six silhouettes gathered in a traditional courtyard
